title: HIGH: DataTable filter column null-safety hole — runtime crash possible
description:
H2 (was labeled H2 but recategorized as HIGH): src/components/ui/data-table.tsx:57
```tsx
const filterCol = filterColumn || (columns[0]?.id as string) || ''
```
- `columns[0]?.id` is `string | undefined` but cast with `as string`
- Fallback to `''` means `table.getColumn('')` returns `undefined`
- `table.getColumn('').setFilterValue(...)` throws TypeError at runtime
- Only triggers if consumer doesn't provide `filterColumn` and `columns[0]` has no `id`

Fix: Add proper null-guard or use optional chaining on the getColumn call.
resolution: Added hasValidFilterColumn guard, filter input only renders when column exists
